data.body:
Gap Analysis AC amendment: Use read-config.sh (external script), not read_config_value (nonexistent function).

apply-attribution-trailers.sh is a standalone script, not a function in post-functions.sh, so it cannot rely on functions sourced by dispatcher.sh. read_config_value does not exist as a standalone function in this codebase.

Amended implementation pattern:
  - Resolve _PLUGIN_ROOT via BASH_SOURCE / readlink at top of script (standard plugin pattern)
  - Call: config_val=$(bash "$_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/read-config.sh" attribution.enabled 2>/dev/null || echo "")
  - If config_val != 'true', exit 0

This matches the pattern used throughout the codebase (e.g., read-config.sh is called similarly in pre-bash-functions.sh and session-misc-functions.sh).
